name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log) in your specs dir. v3.0 added specode-distill sub-skill. v3.1 closes AI-EDS P3-2 (step 2.2 injection renders knowledge content + step 3 design post-check). v3.2 lands FIX-1 (project_root single-source-of-truth via resolve_root verbs) + FIX-2 (knowledge writer rewire — specode-distill delegates yml/md writes to `codemap knowledge write`) + FIX-3d/3e consumer (`--include-shared` flag + 🌐 badge for cross-project shared knowledge). Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ for FIX-2 / 0.4.4+ for FIX-3d/3e.
